summary: OBE close. ISS-1244 asked for a 3,000 km aperture sensitivity row appended to WIN-053 detail_evidence. Verified in current data/wins.json: WIN-053 detail_evidence already contains "...even at 3,000 km (area ≈ 2.83 × 10^7 km², ratio ~44:1) the required B_south ≈ 1,400 nT still falls 46× short of the fitted 64,852 nT — catastrophically self-contradictory regardless of aperture assumption." All four values ISS-1244 specified (area 2.83 × 10^7, ratio ~44:1, B_south ~1,400 nT, ~46× discrepancy) are present. No patch needed; close as resolved-already.
